title: Gaarsiinta & Shixnadaha
emptyState: Wax shixnado ah oo firfircoon lama la socon. Ku dar shixnadaha adigoo isticmaalaya isku-xirka Track17 si aad u aragto saameynta gaarsiinta ee lacagta shaqada.
askPrompt: Shixnadahayga: {inTransitCount} ayaa jidka ku sugan oo qiimahoodu yahay {inTransitValue}, {delayedCount} ayaa daahay ({delayedValue} halis ku jira), kharashka maalgelinta {financingCost}, celceliska gaarsiinta {avgDays} maalmood. Sideen ku yareyn karaa kharashaadka gaarsiinta iyo lacagta shaqada ee jidka ku xayiran?
atRiskWarning: {n} shixnad ayaa lagu calaamadeeyay khatar — waxay sababi kartaa alaab-la'aan ama luminta dakhli haddii ay sii daahdo.
inTransitSummary: {value} oo alaab ah ayaa hadda jidka ku sugan. Lacagtan waxay xayiran tahay celceliskeeda {days} maalmood ilaa alaabtu timaado oo la iibin karo.
